note: PRESERVE-002 is a definition task: baseline commands are DEFINED per peer; execution is deferred to the adoption gate. 'accepted-core' peers are the ones the gate's 'every accepted peer' clause binds; candidate/infra/worktree rows are inventoried for completeness.
